Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau
Shared, marshall-free test-support utilities used across the Juneau test modules.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Simple Variable Language
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions
Built-in VarFunction catalog for #{name(args...)} script-evaluation syntax.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.config.vars
Configuration Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header
HTTP Header Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.microservice
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.widget
HTML Widget API
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl used by org.apache.juneau
    Class
    Description
    Var
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables.
    VarResolverSession
    A var resolver session that combines a VarResolver with one or more session objects.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl used by org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
    Class
    Description
    VarTemplate
    A pre-compiled SVL template.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl used by org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
    Class
    Description
    DefaultingVar
    Interface for the resolution of vars with a default value if the resolve() method returns null.
    SimpleVar
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables that resolve to simple returned string values.
    Var
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables.
    VarFunction
    SPI for SVL #{...} script-evaluation functions.
    VarList
    Simple list of variables that can consist of either variable classes or instances.
    VarResolver
    Utility class for resolving variables of the form "$X{key}" in strings.
    VarResolver.Builder
    Builder class.
    VarResolverException
    Exception that occurs during a var resolver session.
    VarResolverSession
    A var resolver session that combines a VarResolver with one or more session objects.
    VarTemplate
    A pre-compiled SVL template.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl used by org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions
    Class
    Description
    TypedFunction
    Reflection-based base class for VarFunction implementations that prefer typed argument signatures over manual List<Object> unpacking.
    VarFunction
    SPI for SVL #{...} script-evaluation functions.

  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.vars
    Class
    Description
    DefaultingVar
    Interface for the resolution of vars with a default value if the resolve() method returns null.
    MultipartResolvingVar
    Interface for the resolution of vars that can have one or more keys where the first non-null resolution is returned.
    MultipartVar
    Interface for the resolution of vars that consist of a comma-delimited list.
    SimpleVar
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables that resolve to simple returned string values.
    StreamedVar
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables that write their values directly to a writer.
    Var
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables.
    VarResolverSession
    A var resolver session that combines a VarResolver with one or more session objects.

    Class
